turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, uh, is this Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, good morning! You've reached Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic, Pune. How may I assist you today?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan, so I need to book an appointment. For my mother actually. She's been having some knee pain for the past few weeks.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Of course. I can help with that. Could I get your mother's name and her contact number please?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Her name is Sunita Deshmukh. And the number is... umm, 9823041567. That's her mobile.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you. For knee-related concerns we'd recommend our orthopaedics department. Dr. Pramod Joshi is available this Thursday and Friday. Do either of those work?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Thursday would be better. What time slots are there?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We have 10:30 AM and 3:00 PM available on Thursday.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: 3 PM is fine. Let's go with that.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Perfect. I've booked an appointment for Sunita Deshmukh with Dr. Pramod Joshi on Thursday at 3:00 PM. You'll receive a confirmation SMS shortly. Is there anything else?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: No, that's all. Thank you so much.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: You're welcome. Have a good day!
